challenge.explanation:
Jake zaključuje opis, navodeći da je GuardianTech unique cybersecurity solution.

Razlog je što uključuje mnogo komponenti: robust, scalable, cost-effective, flexible, i više — sve u jednom proizvodu.

Pronađi opciju koja opisuje ovo.
challenge.instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje je navedeno/nalazi se ispod.

questions.text:
Nakon što je primio povratne informacije od Alice i izvršio popravke, Jake je završio svoj opis ovako:

In today's fast-changing world, startups need a robust and secure way to protect their data. GuardianTech is not just helpful, it's an essential and critical solution for your digital environment.

Our platform is innovative and cost-effective. It gives you high-quality protection without a big price tag. GuardianTech is also user-friendly and plug-and-play, so you can start using it quickly — no IT team is required.

What makes GuardianTech special is how efficient and flexible it is. It works well with your current systems and can adjust to your team's needs.

As your startup grows, GuardianTech grows with you. It's fully scalable and helps build a sustainable future for your business.

In short, GuardianTech is a unique cybersecurity solution. It gives you everything you need — now and in the future — to stay protected, grow safely, and succeed.

Zašto se GuardianTech naziva jedinstvenim rešenjem?

answers.answer: Zato što spaja mnoge važne komponente u jednom uređaju.
Zato što je jedina aplikacija koja blokira sve napade.
answers.feedback: Ne postoji program koji može da garantuje potpunu zaštitu. Fokus je na stabilnoj podršci, a ne na savršenstvu.

answers.answer: Zato što ima novo ime na tržištu.
Zato što je dostupno samo na kratko.
answers.feedback: Ovaj opis ne navodi ništa o vremenskom ograničenju ili najavama.

challenge.title: Vežba 106
